meaning: adj.鏈偣鐕冪殑,鏃犵伅鍏夌殑
examples: As soon as I walked in the restaurant, I saw him sitting by himself at a table, twirling an unlit cigarette through his fingers like a miniature baton.
Who share the unlit place with me?
The ruined streets on the city鈥檚 outskirts were unlit.
She left Sarah at the bus stop and was last seen walking off alone through unlit wasteland.
Maribel is terrified of walking home alone through the unlit streets at the end of her shift.
